name: Barrier Intelligence
summary: Barrier Intelligence brand theme mapped to the Ceramic semantic contract. Near-black product surfaces with warm gold accents and a measured neutral hierarchy. Hanken Grotesk drives product UI and documentation; any marketing typography remains scoped to theme-owned selectors only.

appWebsite.use: Product UI, dashboards, documentation, and long-form reading

typography.arabicDisplayRule: Use Arabic display scale and IBM Plex Sans Arabic. Do not apply Latin negative tracking rules to Arabic.
typography.rationale: The brand language is quiet and rigorous: restrained type, high legibility on dark surfaces, and gold accents reserved for signal and action.

geometry.elevation: border-led depth with subtle floating shadow on popovers only

semanticMappings.--font-marketing-display: Hanken Grotesk scoped through theme selectors

activationContract.rule: Changing brand must not overwrite the persisted color mode. System follows prefers-color-scheme.

layoutContract.formula: inline-size: min(calc(100% - 2 * var(--page-gutter)), var(--container-standard)); margin-inline: auto
layoutContract.rule: Navigation, hero, and body content share the same responsive gutter. Products do not invent --page or --hero-page aliases.

detectorStatus.accessibility: Pair color with an icon and localized status label; verify text and control contrast in Dark and Light.

assuranceStates.rule: Assurance states are domain semantics, not aliases for generic success/warning/destructive. Never communicate state by color alone.

motionContract.reducedMotion: Core sets durations and distances to zero, disables icon animation, and restores press scale to 1 under prefers-reduced-motion.

fontSupply.hankenGrotesk: Loaded by the theme stylesheet from Google Fonts
fontSupply.jetBrainsMono: Loaded by the theme stylesheet from Google Fonts
fontSupply.ibmPlexSansArabic: Self-hosted in the package with 400, 500, and 700 weights

allow: warm gold accents for primary action and signal
minimal shadow; depth via border and surface steps
restrained detector lime for active and verified engineering states
avoid: colorful gradients as a default surface treatment
marketing display fonts in dense app UI
detector lime used as a decorative or glowing accent

iconPolicy.description: Barrier Intelligence uses lucide icons in UI; brand marks remain outside Ceramic shell chrome.
avoid: mixed icon families in one surface
iconPolicy.coreNote: Icon policy is theme-owned. Core components remain icon-system neutral.

marketingAssetPolicy.relationshipToIcons: Lucide remains the UI icon system. Three-dimensional engineering assets are marketing media, not component icons.
marketingAssetPolicy.material: Machined, technical, and restrained rather than glossy or toy-like.
marketingAssetPolicy.lighting: Directional studio lighting with clear form and no decorative neon glow.
marketingAssetPolicy.background: Near-black or controlled neutral fields with sufficient object separation.

ar.summary: ثيم Barrier Intelligence مربوط بعقد Ceramic الدلالي. يستخدم أسطح منتجات شبه سوداء ولمسات ذهبية دافئة وتسلسلا محايدا محسوبا. يقود Hanken Grotesk واجهة المنتج والتوثيق، وتبقى أي طباعة تسويقية محصورة في محددات يملكها الثيم.

iconPolicy.description: يستخدم Barrier Intelligence أيقونات Lucide في الواجهة، وتبقى علامات الهوية خارج شريط هيكل Ceramic.

aiRules: Read this theme policy after the core semantic contract.
Map Barrier Intelligence palette through semantic tokens only.
Select the Barrier Intelligence brand with data-brand and select Dark, Light, or System independently with data-color-mode.
Use core container and gutter tokens instead of product-local --page or --hero-page aliases.
Use gold for primary actions and high-signal emphasis, not as a full-page wash.
Use detector lime only for active detectors and verified states, always with a non-color status cue.
Use assurance semantic token families for credited, at risk, lost, warning, and verified states.
Prefer near-black and stepped card surfaces with ink hierarchy.
Use Hanken Grotesk for Latin app UI and body copy in this theme.
Use the dedicated marketing H1, H2, and H3 size, line-height, and measure tokens instead of scaling --font-size-display ad hoc.
Keep Arabic on IBM Plex Sans Arabic tokens.
Do not swap Ceramic shell navigation branding when this theme is active.
